name: HYBRID PET/CT IMAGING
definition: combination of high-resolution PET scanner + CT scanner allows acquisition of 3- histologically heterogeneous group of cancers derived from cells of immune system
dominant_finding: enlargement of lymph nodes / secondary lymphoid tissues
discriminating_features: enlargement of lymph nodes / secondary lymphoid tissues
may arise from almost any organ = extranodal lymphoma
uptake lower for indolent compared to aggressive lymphoma (SUV > 10 likely to
aggressive transformation (= change from low-grade to high-grade lymphoma) in 5-
splenic > hepatic uptake indicates splenic involvement
